command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user EFQWm3YEjZYnEtW.efc9f3c7dfef --database NenRJRDsdnS42xQATPd6GP --execute 
ALTER TABLE catalog_products 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS tagline VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT '' AFTER name,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS features TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER description;

ALTER TABLE catalog_variants
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS supplier_code VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL AFTER sku,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cost DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER supplier_code;
